compress_text_caveman_style: compress long text into terse caveman style using an LLM provider while preserving code fences and paths
create_compression_result: create a CompressionResult dataclass to track original chars, compressed chars, and reduction ratio
validate_compression_invariants: validate that compressed text preserved all URLs, code fences, and file paths from the original
extract_invariants_from_text: extract file paths, URLs, and code fences from text as structural invariants for compression validation
review_compression_reduction: review the reduction property on CompressionResult to calculate the percentage of tokens saved by compression
